_comment: M4b R_pay genesis-branch program fixture. The vkey and publicValues below are REAL, computed on this machine: the guest was executed over the reference-generated witness (fixture.json), accepted it (106,110 cycles), and committed exactly these 128 bytes; `client.setup(ELF)` produced this program vkey. The Groth16 `proof` field is null because the final gnark wrap step OOM-killed inside the 11.65GiB colima VM on this 16GB Mac (see research/m4b-real-groth16.md, blocker). Generating the real proof needs a >=32GB host or the Succinct prover network. The on-chain verification path (SP1VerifierGroth16 + SP1PayVerifier forwarding) is proven separately in contracts/test/SP1PayVerifier.t.sol against SP1's real published Groth16 proof (contracts/test/fixtures/sp1-canonical-groth16.json).
publicValuesSchema: abi.encode(uint256 delta, bytes32 N_i, bytes32 C_i, bytes32 root)
proofBlocker: gnark Groth16 wrap OOM in colima VM (11.65GiB) on 16GB host; see research/m4b-real-groth16.md
